Dear Sir/ Madam, 
Sub.: Disclosure under Regulation 42 read with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing 
Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (“Listing Regulations”) 
 
Ref.: Record date in the matter of Scheme of Amalgamation of J. B. Chemicals & 
Pharmaceuticals Limited with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited and their respective 
shareholders 
==================================================================== 
 
 
This is further to our earlier intimations dated 6th July, 2026 and 7th July, 2026 in connection with 
Scheme of Amalgamation of J. B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited (“Transferor Company” 
or “JB Chemicals”) with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited (“Company” or “Transferee Company” 
or “Torrent Pharma”) and their respective shareholders under the provisions of Sections 230 to 
232 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 (“Scheme”) read with the rules 
framed thereunder sanctioned by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad 
Bench (‘Hon’ble NCLT’) vide its order dated 6th July, 2026 (“Order”).  
 
In terms of the Scheme, the Company has, in consultation with JB Chemicals, fixed Friday, 17th 
July, 2026, as the Record Date for the purpose of determining the shareholders of JB Chemicals 
who shall be entitled to receive fully paid-up equity shares of Torrent Pharma as per the share 
exchange ratio set out in the Scheme i.e. 51 fully paid-up equity shares of Torrent Pharma having 
face value of Rs. 5 each for every 100 fully paid-up equity shares of Re. 1 each in JB Chemicals.
